# Sanctir

> Independent research and advisory practice covering national security compliance:
> CMMC and NIST SP 800-171, ITAR and EAR export controls, OFAC sanctions,
> defense industrial base and supply-chain risk, and national security policy analysis.
> Principal: Collin B. George, CISSP. Sanctir LLC, a Delaware limited liability company.

Sanctir publishes dated, versioned assessments with primary-source citations, explicit
limitations, and probability and analytic confidence stated on separate axes. Research is
published under CC BY 4.0 and may be quoted and cited with attribution.

## Research

- [The Deadline Went Away. The Obligations Did Not.](https://sanctir.com/research/cybersecurity-attestation/cmmc-phase-2-suspension/): Assessment SB-2026-01, 20 July 2026. What the July 2026 CMMC Phase II suspension changed and did not change for defense contractors under existing DFARS cybersecurity representations. Core finding: the suspension removed a scheduled verification event, not any underlying obligation, and the enforcement detection channel was never dependent on third-party certification.
- [Research library](https://sanctir.com/research/): Index of published work across five domains.
- [Cybersecurity and Attestation](https://sanctir.com/research/cybersecurity-attestation/): Control implementation, evidence sufficiency, and exposure where attested posture exceeds documented reality.
- [Threat Finance and Sanctions](https://sanctir.com/research/threat-finance-sanctions/)
- [Export Controls and Technology Security](https://sanctir.com/research/export-controls-technology/)
- [Defense Industrial Base and Strategic Sourcing](https://sanctir.com/research/defense-industrial-base/)
- [Statecraft and Policy Analysis](https://sanctir.com/research/statecraft-policy/)

## Method and attribution

- [Analytic methodology](https://sanctir.com/methodology/): Dual-axis probability and confidence labelling, tiered evidence standards, explicit limitations, prohibition on advocacy.
- [Principal](https://sanctir.com/principal/): Collin B. George, CISSP. ORCID 0009-0007-8162-6839.

## Advisory

- [Protect controlled information](https://sanctir.com/services/controlled-information/): CMMC and NIST SP 800-171 readiness and attestation defensibility.
- [Navigate export controls](https://sanctir.com/services/export-controls/): ITAR and EAR jurisdiction, classification, and deemed-export risk.
- [Counter threat finance and sanctions risk](https://sanctir.com/services/financial-sanctions-risk/): OFAC and AML exposure.
- [Build resilient supply chains](https://sanctir.com/supply-chain/): Dependency mapping and beneficial-ownership resolution.
- [Support national security and policy decisions](https://sanctir.com/services/national-security-policy/)

## Optional

- [Security posture](https://sanctir.com/security/): Verifiable controls, stated limitations, RFC 9116 disclosure policy.
- [Encrypted communication](https://sanctir.com/pgp/): OpenPGP key and Signal.
- [Contact](https://sanctir.com/contact/)
